name: Double Chocolate Cream Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour the bottom only of a 13x9-inch pan.
1. In a large bowl, combine all cake ingredients at low speed until moistened.
Beat for 1 minute at medium speed (batter will be thin).
2. Pour batter into prepared pan.
3. In a small bowl, beat 1/3 cup sugar, cream cheese, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract,
and 1 egg until fluffy. Stir in chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
4. Evenly spoon filling over the batter; sprinkle with 1/4 cup sugar.
5. Bake for 45-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool completely before storing in the refrigerator.
